name: Kong Konnect
description: Monitor Kong API gateway for team access and role-based API management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Kong Konnect at https://cloud.konghq.com
2. Go to Personal Access Tokens
3. Generate a new token
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Kong Konnect → Personal Access Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Kong Konnect organization members and their roles

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies Kong Konnect API gateway has role-based access configured
